login.title: Sign in to Nova Fora
login.subtitle: Fleet inspection, defects, and work orders in one place.
login.userDisabled: This account is disabled. Contact your admin.
login.userPending: This account is pending. Check your email for the activation link.
login.demoAccountsHint: Each role has its own navigation, permissions and workflows.
login.networkError: Network error — is the API reachable?
login.demoTipPart1: Click a card to auto-fill credentials, then click
login.demoTipPart2: Tip: all demo accounts share password

signupAccept.invitedBy: {{inviter}} invited you to be a {{role}} at this {{orgType}} on Nova Fora.
signupAccept.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with one letter and one number.
signupAccept.passwordError: Must be 8+ chars with at least one letter and one number.
signupAccept.termsHint: By creating an account you agree to Nova Fora's terms of service.
signupAccept.errorIncomplete: Invitation link is missing or malformed. Ask your inviter to resend it.
signupAccept.errorNotFound: This invitation doesn't exist or has been revoked.
signupAccept.errorExpiredFmt: This invitation is no longer valid ({{detail}}).
